refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on monitoring energy use, controlling operations to reduce energy, and optimizing system performance aligns with measurable and actionable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by measuring energy_per_ton over the evaluation period and confirming it meets ≤ E_target; validate monitoring data accuracy, control responsiveness, and optimization effectiveness.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize system parameters to improve energy efficiency continuously.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy energy sensors and data acquisition systems for real-time monitoring.
DP2: Implement adaptive control algorithms to adjust vehicle operation parameters.
DP3: Use predictive analytics and machine learning for continuous optimization.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to address monitoring, control, and optimization respectively.

potential_sources: Data dependency between monitoring and control modules.
Feedback loops between control and optimization algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and managed via well-defined data interfaces; modular separation supports maintainability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensors and reliable data communication.
Risk of algorithm performance degradation under varying operational conditions.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and fallback modes for sensor or communication failures.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components including sensors and control actuators embedded in the vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends energy consumption and operational data to NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle receives operational commands from Teleoperation or NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of sensing and control functions; low diffusion as core physical operations are localized.
Contains data aggregation and optimization logic; moderate diffusion due to cross-module data sharing.
Limited containment; mainly command interface, higher diffusion due to interaction with Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
Minimal containment for energy efficiency; mostly safety alerts and monitoring.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy monitoring and control are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize latency and ensure tight integration with physical components.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in Vehicle software due to added control and monitoring logic.
Dependency on reliable telemetry interface for data sharing with NGHE Solution.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider offloading optimization algorithms to NGHE Solution to reduce Vehicle software complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear traceability and measurable verification.

diffusion_risks: Data sharing between Vehicle and NGHE Solution may cause interface complexity.
Control logic diffusion if optimization is partially implemented outside Vehicle.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Vehicle as primary IM for monitoring and control; optimization may be distributed.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and operational logs; ownership boundaries are clear.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of sensing and control to Vehicle; optimization split between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit interface contracts for telemetry and tasking to reduce diffusion risks.
Evaluate feasibility of moving optimization algorithms fully to NGHE Solution IM.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, the optimization DP and IM boundary need clearer definition and potential reassignment to reduce diffusion and complexity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize system parameters to improve energy efficiency continuously.

revise.why: To clarify and possibly reassign optimization implementation to NGHE Solution module to reduce Vehicle software complexity and diffusion.

assumptions: Accurate sensors and reliable telemetry are available.
Control algorithms can be embedded in Vehicle software.
Optimization algorithms may require higher computational resources.
open_risks: Interface complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
Performance impact of distributed optimization logic.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data accuracy and latency measurements.
Performance benchmarks of control and optimization algorithms in Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
